name: engram
description: Persistent, explainable memory for Codex via the Engram MCP server. BYOK end-to-end — inference is billed by your LLM provider, not us.

ENGRAM_API_KEY.description: Your Engram API key from https://lumetra.io (looks like eng_live_...). Codex stores this in its secret store on install.
